zh.lifeSummary: 當Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenberg於1373年出生在德國海因里希_普洛文斯 本 薩可尼藍德可萊斯 維騰格時，他的父親Wenceslas von Sachsen-Wittenberg, I, Herzog, Kurfürst zu Sachsen, Herzog zu Braunschweig-Lünebur38歲，母親Cecilia Gigliola da Carrara17歲。他於從大約1387年到1389年與Anna von Wettin在德國薩辛-安哈爾特藍德可萊斯 維騰格結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1419年6月9日在德國薩辛-安哈爾特藍德可萊斯 維騰格維騰格享年46歲，埋葬在德國薩辛-安哈爾特藍德可萊斯 維騰格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenberg于1373年出生在德国海因里希_普洛文斯 本 薩可尼藍德可萊斯 維騰格时，他的父亲Wenceslas von Sachsen-Wittenberg, I, Herzog, Kurfürst zu Sachsen, Herzog zu Braunschweig-Lünebur38岁，母亲Cecilia Gigliola da Carrara17岁。他于从大约1387年到1389年与Anna von Wettin在德国薩辛-安哈爾特藍德可萊斯 維騰格结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1419年6月9日在德国薩辛-安哈爾特藍德可萊斯 維騰格維騰格享年46岁，埋葬在德国薩辛-安哈爾特藍德可萊斯 維騰格。

nameMeanings.name: Von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Rudolf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Latinized version, Rudolphus, of the Germanic name Hrōdwulf ( see Rolf ). It was introduced to the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century. Rudolf was a hereditary name among the Habsburgs, the Holy Roman Emperors and rulers of Austria, from the Emperor Rudolf I ( 1218–91 ) to the Archduke Rudolf , Crown Prince of Austria-Hungary, who died in mysterious circumstances at his country house at Meyerling in 1889 . Rudolf Rassendyll was the central character of Anthony Hope's adventure stories The Prisoner of Zenda ( 1894 ) and Rupert of Hentzau ( 1898 ), in which he is an English gentleman who bears a great physical resemblance to the King of Ruritania, to whom he is distantly related. He successfully impersonates the king for reasons of state. In the early 20th century the popularity of this name was further enhanced by the American silent-film actor Rudolph Valentino ( 1895–1926 ), born in Italy as Rodolfo di Valentina d'Antonguolla . It has not been used much in recent times, perhaps being inextricably associated with ‘the red-nosed reindeer’ of the Christmas song.

variants.name: Rudolph
meanings: From a Latinized version, Rudolphus, of the Germanic name Hrōdwulf ( see Rolf ). It was introduced to the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century. Rudolf was a hereditary name among the Habsburgs, the Holy Roman Emperors and rulers of Austria, from the Emperor Rudolf I ( 1218–91 ) to the Archduke Rudolf , Crown Prince of Austria-Hungary, who died in mysterious circumstances at his country house at Meyerling in 1889 . Rudolf Rassendyll was the central character of Anthony Hope's adventure stories The Prisoner of Zenda ( 1894 ) and Rupert of Hentzau ( 1898 ), in which he is an English gentleman who bears a great physical resemblance to the King of Ruritania, to whom he is distantly related. He successfully impersonates the king for reasons of state. In the early 20th century the popularity of this name was further enhanced by the American silent-film actor Rudolph Valentino ( 1895–1926 ), born in Italy as Rodolfo di Valentina d'Antonguolla . It has not been used much in recent times, perhaps being inextricably associated with ‘the red-nosed reindeer’ of the Christmas song.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenberg was born in 1373, in Wittenberg, Province of Saxony, Prussia, Germany, his father, Wenceslas von Sachsen-Wittenberg, I, Herzog, Kurfürst zu Sachsen, Herzog zu Braunschweig-Lünebur, was 38 and his mother, Cecilia Gigliola da Carrara, was 17. He married Anna von Wettin from about 1387 to 1389, in Wittenberg, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 9 June 1419, in Wittenberg, Wittenberg, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany, at the age of 46, and was buried in Wittenberg, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenberg est né en 1373, à Landkreis Wittenberg, Province of Saxony, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Wenceslas von Sachsen-Wittenberg, I, Herzog, Kurfürst zu Sachsen, Herzog zu Braunschweig-Lünebur, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Cecilia Gigliola da Carrara, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Anna von Wettin du environ 1387 au 1389, à Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 9 juin 1419, à Wittenberg, Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenberg 1373 in Landkreis Wittenberg, Province of Saxony, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Wenceslas von Sachsen-Wittenberg, I, Herzog, Kurfürst zu Sachsen, Herzog zu Braunschweig-Lünebur 38 und seine Mutter Cecilia Gigliola da Carrara 17. Er hat von um 1387 bis 1389 in Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland Anna von Wettin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 9. Juni 1419 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Wittenberg, Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland und wurde in Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenberg è nato il nel 1373 nel Landkreis Wittenberg, Province of Saxony, Preußen, Germania, il suo padre, Wenceslas von Sachsen-Wittenberg, I, Herzog, Kurfürst zu Sachsen, Herzog zu Braunschweig-Lünebur, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Cecilia Gigliola da Carrara, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Anna von Wettin da circa 1387 a 1389, nel Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 9 giugno 1419, nel Wittenberg, Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Germania, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenbergが1373年にドイツプレウssンプロヴィンス オフ サクソニーランドクレイス ウィッテンバーグで生まれた時，父Wenceslas von Sachsen-Wittenberg, I, Herzog, Kurfürst zu Sachsen, Herzog zu Braunschweig-Lüneburは38歳，母Cecilia Gigliola da Carraraは17歳であった。から約1387年まで1389年にドイツサチセン-アンハルトランドクレイス ウィッテンバーグでAnna von Wettinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1419年6月9日にドイツサチセン-アンハルトランドクレイス ウィッテンバーグウィッテンバーグで46歳で死去し，ドイツサチセン-アンハルトランドクレイス ウィッテンバーグにて埋葬された。

ko.Wittenberg, Sachsen, Prussia, Germany: 독일 플레우ss 플로빈스 프 사스니 랜드크레이스 윗텐버그
ko.lifeSummary: Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenberg(이)가 1373년 독일 플레우ss 플로빈스 프 사스니 랜드크레이스 윗텐버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Wenceslas von Sachsen-Wittenberg, I, Herzog, Kurfürst zu Sachsen, Herzog zu Braunschweig-Lünebur(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia Gigliola da Carrara(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1387년 부터 1389년 까지 독일 작센-아할트 랜드크레이스 윗텐버그에서 Anna von Wettin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1419년 6월 9일 독일 작센-아할트 랜드크레이스 윗텐버그 윗텐버그에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 작센-아할트 랜드크레이스 윗텐버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenberg nasceu em 1373, em Landkreis Wittenberg, Province of Saxony, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Wenceslas von Sachsen-Wittenberg, I, Herzog, Kurfürst zu Sachsen, Herzog zu Braunschweig-Lünebur, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia Gigliola da Carrara, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna von Wettin de aproximadamente 1387 a 1389, em Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 9 de junho de 1419, em Wittenberg, Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemanha, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemanha.

ru.of,Wittenberg,Westpreussen,Prussia: Нивенское, крис преуssищ эилау, остпреуssен, Пруссия, Германия
ru.Wittenberg, Sachsen, Prussia, Germany: ландкрис виттенбирг, провинц оф саксони, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenberg родился в 1373 г. в местности ландкрис виттенбирг, провинц оф саксони, Пруссия, Германия, его отцу по имени Wenceslas von Sachsen-Wittenberg, I, Herzog, Kurfürst zu Sachsen, Herzog zu Braunschweig-Lünebur было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecilia Gigliola da Carrara, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna von Wettin с около 1387 по 1389 в местности ландкрис виттенбирг, сачсен-анэлт, Германия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 9 июня 1419 г. в местности виттенбирг, ландкрис виттенбирг, сачсен-анэлт, Германия в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности ландкрис виттенбирг, сачсен-анэлт, Германия.

es.Wittenberg, Sachsen, Prussia, Germany: Landkreis Wittenberg, Province of Saxony, Preußen, Alemania
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenberg nació en 1373, en Landkreis Wittenberg, Province of Saxony, Preußen, Alemania, su papá, Wenceslas von Sachsen-Wittenberg, I, Herzog, Kurfürst zu Sachsen, Herzog zu Braunschweig-Lünebur, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Cecilia Gigliola da Carrara, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Anna von Wettin desde aproximadamente 1387 hasta 1389, en Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 9 de junio de 1419, en Wittenberg, Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemania, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemania.
